title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at PC Jeweller
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, PC Jeweller in Coimbatore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
